display.purpose: Page titles, hero sections. Large and bold.

title.purpose: Card titles, panel headings, feature names.

body.purpose: Primary reading text, descriptions, paragraph content.

label.purpose: Form labels, metadata, timestamps, helper text.

stat.purpose: Numeric values, metrics, key figures on dashboards.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: Modals, dropdowns, tooltips — floating elements only.

motion.name: interactive
motion.purpose: Default transition duration for all interactive states.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary call-to-action. Terminal Green fill with black text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 7px; height: 40px; padding: 0 20px; background: #00C853; color: #000; border: none; border-radius: 999px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #00E676; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0,200,83,0.14); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent with subtle border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 7px; height: 40px; padding: 0 20px; background: transparent; color: var(--ds-text, #E8F5E9); border: 1px solid var(--ds-border2, #283228); border-radius: 999px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #00C853; color: #00C853; background: var(--ds-surface2, #171C17); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Default Input
components.description: Standard text input with green focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 38px; padding: 0 12px; background: var(--ds-surface2, #171C17); border: 1px solid var(--ds-border2, #283228); border-radius: 8px; color: var(--ds-text, #E8F5E9); font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--ds-text3, #4D6B4D); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #00C853; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0,200,83,0.14); }

components.name: Default Card
components.description: Flat card container with subtle border.
components.html:
Project Name
Card content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--ds-surface, #111411); border: 1px solid var(--ds-border, #1F2B1F); border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; font-weight: 500; color: var(--ds-text, #E8F5E9); } .ds-card-body { font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--ds-text2, #8BAD8B); }

components.name: Green Badge
components.description: Compact informational badge in Terminal Green.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; letter-spacing: 0.01em; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; background: rgba(0,200,83,0.15); color: #00E676; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation item with green active state.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--ds-text2, #8BAD8B); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; text-decoration: none; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; background: transparent; border: none; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: var(--ds-text, #E8F5E9); background: var(--ds-surface2, #171C17); } .ds-nav-item-active { color: #00C853; background: rgba(0,200,83,0.12); }

narrative.overview: A physical toolbench — flat surfaces, crisp edges, everything in reach. No ornament, no clutter. Every surface exists because a tool needs a place to rest. The aesthetic is a well-organized workshop: precise alignment, clean separation of work areas, and a quiet confidence that comes from purpose-built design. This system explicitly rejects trendy SaaS clichés: no gradient accents, no glassmorphism, no heavy shadows, no animated flourishes. It leans into its developer-tool DNA — dark by default, type-driven, with green as the sole accent signal. The user is here to work; the interface steps aside.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first, flat surfaces with tonal layering for depth
Green (#00C853) as the single focus color — used for primary actions, active states, and indicators only
Type-driven hierarchy: large headings, clean sans, generous letter-spacing
Subtle rounded corners (4px–12px range), never exaggerated
Sparse borders, relying on surface contrast for separation

rules.name: The Single-Accent Rule
rules.body: Green is used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point. If green appears more than once per viewport (aside from the primary CTA), check whether the second instance can use a neutral treatment.

rules.name: The Flat Scale Rule
rules.body: Type hierarchy comes from weight (500/600 vs 400) and size ratio (≥1.25 between display-headline-body). Never add underlines, colored backgrounds, or decorative rules to headings.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No drop shadows, no box-shadow elevation. Depth is conveyed exclusively through tonal layering: surfaces get progressively lighter (darker in dark mode) as they move toward the user.

dos: Do use green only for interactive elements and state indicators. Never for decoration.
Do rely on surface contrast (tonal layers) for separation. Add borders only when layers don’t provide enough distinction.
Do use large type as the primary hierarchical signal. Headings at 22px+, body at 13px.
Do keep cards flat. No shadows, no hover lift.
Do use JetBrains Mono for code, data values, timestamps, and labels.
Do use 150ms transitions for interactive elements.
Do use the single pill-shape for all buttons (999px radius).
Do keep inputs simple: Ash background, Thicker Vine border, green focus ring.
donts: Don’t use gradient text, glassmorphism, or decorative blur effects.
Don’t use box-shadow on cards or static surfaces. Shadows are for floating elements only.
Don’t add side-stripe borders (border-left/right > 1px as accent).
Don’t animate layout properties (width, height, top, left).
Don’t add decorative illustrations, branded graphics, or animated mascots.
Don’t use rounded corners larger than 12px on containers.
Don’t use display fonts or font pairings.
Don’t repeat the hero-metric pattern (big number, small label, gradient accent).
Don’t overlay green on green surfaces. Green needs dark or black backing for readability.
